name: Marenica Energy Limited
description: Elevate Uranium Limited, formerly known as Marenica Energy Limited, is an Australian-based uranium exploration and development company. The company holds significant uranium resources across Namibia and Australia, with a strategic focus on becoming a key supplier to the nuclear energy industry. Elevate Uranium distinguishes itself through its proprietary U-pgrade™ beneficiation process, which is designed to significantly reduce capital and operational costs by producing a high-grade concentrate prior to leaching. The company is actively engaged in exploration and resource development, aiming to provide sustainable, carbon-free energy solutions through its diverse portfolio of uranium projects.
